reasoning: Koren, we need to address your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance to help you perform better on sustained climbs like the Alpine Loop. Your last Zwift ride indicates you’re in a recovery trend, so let's not push too hard just yet. We’ll simulate the challenging sections of the Alpine Loop to build your capacity to clear lactate effectively.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3 sets of 5x (3 min at 242-256W, 2 min at 201-218W) with 3 min recovery between sets at 209W.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
